name: Terrifying Zombies: Tower Defense 1 Game
description: Survive the horde in Terrifying Zombies! Build strategic towers, upgrade defenses, and stop the undead. NEW: Level Up system! Gain XP to unlock powerful commander upgrades and dominate the battlefield. Features: Intense TD action Multiple zombie types Browser-play (No download) Im constantly adding levels to this early access version. Hit Like and leave your suggestions!
instructions: WASD or Arrow Keys Move Left Click Shoot Select and Place Towers P Pause Game amp Save Menu
